hero.headline: Built For The Way You Move
hero.subheadline: Premium activewear designed for confident women who train hard, live stylishly, and never compromise on comfort.

home.lifestyleSubtitle: Activewear that moves with your life — studio mornings, coffee runs, and everything in between.
home.newCollectionSubtitle: Latest arrivals crafted for movement and everyday elegance.
home.whyRubeSubtitle: Every piece is designed with intention — for women who expect more.
home.premiumFabricsDesc: Buttery-soft, performance-grade fabrics that feel luxurious against your skin.
home.flatteringFitsDesc: Sculpting silhouettes designed to celebrate your shape, not hide it.
home.designedForMovementDesc: Four-way stretch and thoughtful construction for every rep and every rest day.
home.everydayComfortDesc: From reformer to brunch — pieces you'll reach for again and again.
home.communitySubtitle: We're building a community of women who move with purpose, style, and self-assurance. Join us.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Early access to drops, styling tips, and exclusive offers — straight to your inbox.

footer.tagline: Premium activewear for the way you move.

about.title: About RUBE
about.subtitle: For women who move with confidence
about.story: RUBE was born from a simple belief: activewear should feel as beautiful as it performs. We create pieces for women who train hard, live stylishly, and refuse to compromise — whether you're on the reformer, at pilates, or grabbing coffee after class.
about.mission: Our mission is to empower every woman through movement — with premium fabrics, flattering fits, and designs that transition effortlessly from studio to street.
